weekly_brief_narrative: Search results yielded no substantive conflict developments from specified Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources for the week ending April 25, 2026, across all eight theatres. This includes zero qualifying findings for active theatres (Russia-Ukraine, Gaza, Sudan, Myanmar, DRC, Iran), violating minimum coverage for Sudan, Myanmar, and DRC where structural gaps persist despite targeted ACLED/UCDP/UN OCHA checks. Russia-Ukraine remains at baseline kinetic intensity with no new I2 troop movements or I3 nuclear signals beyond 2024 doctrine. Gaza shows no I5 diplomatic breakthroughs or I6 humanitarian shifts. Sudan stalemate entrenches without reported RSF/SAF escalations; Myanmar junta fragmentation lacks fresh I2 ethnic offensives; DRC M23 dynamics stable absent mineral coercion updates. Iran tensions hold without proxy activations. Watch theatres Haiti and Sahel exhibit no entry triggers like Port-au-Prince gang thresholds or junta consolidations. Displacement trends unavailable without IDMC refresh; no acute I6 accelerations noted. Monitor in coming week: ACLED weekly data drops for Sudan/Myanmar/DRC fatality spikes; ISW updates on Ukraine ceasefire framework; UN OCHA alerts for Gaza/Sudan corridor closures; ICG CrisisWatch for Sahel deteriorations. Thresholds include ≥15% IDP velocity spikes or dual-source I2 confirmations to signal trajectory shifts.
